title: EMG-based biomechanical cybernetic control of an avatar robotic fish
author: Montoya, Manuel
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The file 'EMG-ANN-Data.txt' comprises six columns of experimental data:
Timing records obtained from the EMG measurement device (s).
Electromyographic data, filtered to remove noise (micro-Volts). 3, 4, 5,
The four outputs of the deep artificial neural network are represented in a binary numerical base as (y3, y2, y1, y0). Data represent recognition of twelve upper limbs muscular gestures.
